narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text explicitly links Russia's 'खस्ता' (deteriorated) condition to Western sanctions, highlighting the negative impact of Western actions on Russia. This frames the sanctions as a cause of Russia's decline, which aligns with the narrative of predicting or reporting adverse outcomes for Russia as a consequence of Western policies.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The phrase 'प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है' (is enduring/suffering sanctions) portrays Russia as passively bearing the brunt of punitive Western actions. This language evokes sympathy by framing Russia as a target of external pressure, supporting the narrative of Russia being unfairly targeted or victimized.

This frames the Western actions (sanctions) as having a direct, adverse consequence for Russia, aligning with the narrative of highlighting negative outcomes for the West's target.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: माना जा रहा है कि रूस ने पिछले दो सालों में सैन्य शक्ति मजबूत करने के लिए रक्षा क्षेत्र पर अधिक खर्च किया है और इस कोशिश में कई पैमानों पर पिछड़ गया है।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement speculates on the consequences of Russia's war effort, suggesting that its focus on military strength has caused it to fall behind in other areas. It makes an assumption about the outcome of Russia's strategic choices in the context of the war.
